  description (Polar SC outperforms autoencoder, not the reverse)

commit.message:
refactor: decouple AI Foundry from core infra and simplify hosted agent pipeline

- Extract AI Foundry from main.bicep into standalone deployment
  (deploy-ai-foundry.yml) — fixes ARM race condition root cause
- Replace custom register_hosted_agent.py (186 lines) with azd deploy
- Simplify deploy-infra.yml: remove fragile cancel/retry/poll logic for
  AI Foundry (60+ lines of workarounds eliminated)
- Remove build-hosted-agent job from build-and-push.yml (azd handles it)
- Add azure.yaml for azd AI Foundry hosted agent extension
- main.bicep now references existing AI Foundry via 'existing' keyword
  instead of deploying it inline

Before: 3 workflows + custom Python script
After:  2 independent workflows (core infra + AI Foundry) + azd agent deploy

commit.message:
feat: implement GatherBlockQuantized operator (#673)

* feat: implement GatherBlockQuantized operator

Add support for the com.microsoft::GatherBlockQuantized contrib operator
which combines gather and block dequantization in a single operation.

Supports:
- Packed data (UINT8 containing 4-bit values) and native sub-byte types (INT4, UINT4)
- 4-bit and 8-bit quantization
- Optional zero_points (packed or unpacked)
- Configurable gather_axis and quantize_axis
- Default zero_point of 2^(bits-1) for unsigned data types
